title: EVIDENCE_QUERY_REQUEST
description: Request from the assessment AI to each terminal for submission of evidence data and statements

target_period.description: Time range from which evidence is to be extracted

required_fields.description: Specific data items whose submission is requested

items.description: Field name as defined in the applicable Norm profile.

request_human_readable_statement.description: Whether a human-readable statement is requested from the responding party. The granularity and required content of the statement may be defined by the applicable Norm profile.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when this request was sent.
